# SuperSaaS Auth Connector

SuperSaaS Auth Connector bridges Keycloak OIDC authentication with SuperSaaS user
management. It is a small Starlette application delivered as a container image.
When a user authenticates via Keycloak, the connector creates a corresponding user
account in SuperSaaS (if it does not already exist) and then forwards the user
directly into SuperSaaS via the SuperSaaS login API.

## Guide

- [Getting Started](https://radiorabe.github.io/supersaas-auth-connector/getting-started/)

- [Architecture](https://radiorabe.github.io/supersaas-auth-connector/architecture/)
